narrative:
Leetonia Ex Vill Sd (Columbiana) exempted village school district has 2,880 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a clear Republican lean of 10.1 percentage points.
